description_en: Malmö may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 82 halal restaurants and 5 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Malmö, Sweden, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Malmö: 90 halal restaurants listed, 5 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
